evidence.transcript: Document Gov Docs Report Of The Scientic Panel On Ufos
evidence.excerpt: Document Gov Docs Report Of The Scientic Panel On Ufos CENTRAL INTELLIGENCE AGENCY; WASHINGTON 25, D. C. a 13 March 1953 The Secretary of Defense 'Department of Defense Washington 25, BD. C. The Director of Central Intelligence has asked thet you. be furnished a copy of the attached report prepered by a panel of seientiste on the subject of "Unidentified Flying Objects." This panel was convened at the direction of General Smith, following the recommendation of the Intelligence Advisory Cowmittee. The conclusions and recomendations may be of interest to you, in that they point out certain potential dangers to national security. which are releted to the subject and suggest ways of their elimination. Although this Agency-does not--consider probleus-earieing from sightings of "flying saucers" primarily its concern, ve shall be pleased to assist in any appropriete action that you may deem adv
